# ⚠️ Generated Code | Do Not Edit

Everything in this folder is auto-generated by [sqlc](https://sqlc.dev/).

Any manual changes will be overwritten the next time someone runs:

```bash
just generate
```

## How it works

sqlc reads two things:

1. Migrations (`internal/db/migrations/`): your database schema
2. Queries (`internal/db/queries/`): your SQL queries with special comments

From those it generates type-safe Go code in this folder.

## When to regenerate

Run `just generate` after:

- Adding or changing a migration
- Adding or changing a query in `internal/db/queries/`

## Learn more

- [sqlc docs](https://docs.sqlc.dev/en/latest/)
- [sqlc query syntax](https://docs.sqlc.dev/en/latest/howto/select.html)
